verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, You multiplied some fish and some bread What a miracle the multitude was fed We want to be blessed like that little lad When He came to You and gave all he had.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord, You are the Blesser of blessings Lord, You are the Giver of all gifts Lord, You are our Jehovah Jireh and You will supply all our needs

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: From ages and time so many will say, You are faithful Lord to your people everyday You said if we knock, You will open the door If we seek we'll find your riches and more.
